tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address | grep -A3 -B1 'DNS-Exfil-Server\|Cal dera_Server'
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 86c6a2ca-2aaa-51f1-ea6e-ee47e9103dd9
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
--
    next
    edit "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set uuid 5df50696-32a9-51f1-df04-8445b1ae9614
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 2
    edit 0
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"
        set uuid 772b97b0-32a9-51f1-dd82-e670b8c41216
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
